Web Item Name: Magpul PMAG D-50 Handgun Magazine for Glock 9mm Luger 50/rd
Web Item Description:
Lightweight but incredibly strong othe Magpul PMAG D-50 GL9 is a highly reliable 9x19mm Parabellum 50-round drum magazine optimized for double-stack 9mm GLOCK handguns.

The Magpul D-50 GL9 – GLOCK boasts many of the proven features of its 5.56 and 7.62 predecessors the PMAG D-60 AR/M4 and PMAG D-50 LR/SR GEN M3 while providing the user with a similar magazine capacity increase. Providing 50-round capacity the unique drum configuration keeps the height of the magazine manageable allowing for easier storage. For easy loading it includes a ratcheting loading lever that removes tension from the internal spring.

To keep track of your available firepower Magpul included a rounds-remaining rear window a high-visibility follower and a capacity indication roller.

Easily disassembled for cleaning and featuring an innovative bolt hold-open feature the D-50 GL9 reliably locks the bolt back on empty when used with firearms designed to lock back on GLOCK pattern magazine followers.

It is recommended that you install a new OEM magazine release on Gen 1-3 GLOCK handguns to support the extra weight of the magazine. Gen 4 GLOCK handguns will require an aftermarket metal magazine release. Installation of a new recoil spring assembly to ensure reliable feeding is strongly recommended. Individual variations between firearms may result in an extra power recoil spring being required.

Use of this D-50 GL9 in pistol caliber carbines (PCC) is not recommended because the increased length of the feed tower will be partially unsupported in most pistol caliber magazine wells. This unsupported condition may cause premature wear on the feed tower magazine catch and (in firearms which deviate from factory magazine well specifications) may result in improper round presentation and failures to feed.

Made in the USA.

Web Item Name: Magpul PMAG 20 AR 300 B Gen M3 Rifle Magazine 300 AAC BLK 20/rd
Web Item Description:
The PMAG 20 AR 300 B GEN M3 is a purpose-built magazine for rifles chambered in .300 Blackout (300 BLK). Similar in every way to our PMAG 30 AR 300 B the PMAG 20 is more compact for increased maneuverability and creates a more concealable package for use in small format firearms.

Since its inception 300 BLK shooters have had to use a magazine designed for another cartridge limiting that round’s ultimate performance and compatibility. One of the key features of 300 BLK in the past has been its compatibility with 5.56x45mm magazines. However even with moderate success with that particular magazine it is a compromise to do so with reliability and safety both being at risk.

In addition to the performance gained by a dedicated mag the PMAG 20 AR 300 B also offers a safer way to feed your 300 BLK rifle. When using 5.56x45mm mags the potential to chamber and fire a 300 BLK round in a 5.56x45mm rifle with catastrophic results requires diligent ammunition management by the shooter. The PMAG 20 AR 300 B’s distinct ribbed design and smoother upper-half texture provides the shooter a distinct visual and tactile difference from any other PMAG to mitigate dangerous cross-loading issues.

Along with optimized 300 BLK performance the PMAG 20 incorporates all of our GEN M3 features including our next-generation impact and crush resistant polymer aggressive front and rear texture an easily removable slim floor plate a paint pen dot matrix for marking and identification and a dust/impact cover.

Made in the USA.

Item Name: MAGPUL MAG 10/30 AR/M4 GEN M3 BK
Web Item Name: Magpul PMAG 10/30 AR/M4 Gen M3 Rifle Magazine 5.56x45 NATO 10/rd
Web Item Description:
The PMAG 10/30 AR/M4 GEN M3 is a 10-round polymer magazine for AR15/M4 compatible weapons chambered in 5.56x45 NATO/.223 Remington. It was designed for users who reside in areas with magazine capacity restrictions but desire a standard 30-round magazine form.

Built in-line with our other PMAGS the PMAG 10/30 provides the same next-gen impact and crush resistance constant curve geometry and long-life stainless-steel spring to ensure smooth feeding. We’ve added a proprietary lock plate that reduces the maximum capacity to 10 rounds and it’s permanently secured by an aluminum rivet. A lock plate tab that’s clearly marked for capacity is also included. With the standard 30-round magazine form the PMAG 10/30 maintains mag pouch compatibility while complying with local restrictions.

The PMAG 10/30 includes other features found throughout the GEN M3 line. Its redesigned bolt catch notch in the rear of the magazine provides increased bolt catch clearance while an over-travel stop on the spine helps ensure the magazine will not over-insert on compatible weapons. Low profile ribs and new aggressive front and rear texture give positive control of the PMAG 10/30 in all environments and a paint pen dot matrix located at the bottom panel of the body allows for easy marking for identification.

***Not designed or intended to be modified in any way.***

Made in the USA.

Item Name: Magpul PMAG 20 Round LR/SR Gen M3 Window BLK
Web Item Name: Magpul PMAG LR/SR Gen M3 for SR25/M110 Rifle Magazine Black 7.62x51mm/.308 Win 20/rd
Web Item Description:
The PMAG 20 LR/SR GEN M3 Window is a lightweight cost effective highly reliable 20-round magazine for SR25/M110 pattern rifles chambered in 7.62x51 NATO (.308 Winchester). Constructed from next-generation impact and crush-resistant polymer the new magazine features durable dual-side transparent windows which allow for a quick count of the approximate number of rounds remaining in the magazine via a high visibility indicator coil on the spring and numerical markers on the magazine body. This proprietary capability known as the MagLevel system provides a fast round-count estimation without affecting the durability or reliability of the magazine. Like Magpul's other PMAGs the 20 LR/SR GEN M3 Window magazine features a stainless-steel corrosion-resistant spring and an anti-tilt self-lubricating follower. The magazine’s lines follow a constant-curve internal geometry for continuous reliable feeding. The low-profile ribs and aggressive front and rear texturing help give shooters a positive grip for magazine changes in all environments. A paint pen dot matrix at the bottom panel of the body allows easy marking by the end user for identification purposes.

Magpul's standard features include a flared floorplate that aids extraction and handling of the magazine; this flared floorplate also improves drop protection and is slim enough to ensure better compatibility with tight double magazine pouches. The magazine is also simple to disassemble and makes for easy cleaning and maintenance when necessary.

Designed specifically for SAAMI-spec ammunition the PMAG 20 LR/SR GEN M3 Window is less than half the weight of standard issue steel magazines and maintains a service life round count approximately equal to the rifle barrel itself. Accessories designed for the 7.62X51 NATO line of PMAGs are also compatible with the PMAG 20 Window.

Made in the USA.

In addition a redesigned bolt catch notch in the rear of the magazine provides increased bolt catch clearance while an over-travel stop on the front spine helps ensure the magazine will not over-insert on compatible weapons. Low-profile ribs and a new aggressive front and rear texture give positive control in all environments and the bottom panel of the body includes a paint pen dot matrix to allow easy marking for identification.

The new easily disassembled flared floorplate aids extraction and handling of the magazine while providing improved drop protection but is slightly slimmer for better compatibility with magazine pouches while allowing for simple disassembly for cleaning purposes. Durable dual-side transparent windows promote easy determination of remaining round count in the magazine when combined with a high visibility indicator coil on the spring and numerical markers on the magazine body. Like other windowed PMAGs the MagLevel system provides positive verification without affecting the durability or reliability of the magazine.

Made in the USA.
